basic_details.job_title: BKNMU Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Professor, Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University (BKNMU) Teaching Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website of BKNMU. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the BKNMU Recruitment 2026 for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., Master's Degree, NET/SLET/SET (As per post)
qualification.details: Professor: Ph.D. with 10 years teaching/research experience, 10 publications, research score 120 as per UGC Regulations 2018. Associate Professor: Ph.D. with Master's 55%, 8 years experience, 7 publications, research score 75 as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor: Master's 55% with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on Academic/Research Score Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BKNMU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bknmu.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.bhakta_kavi_narsinh_mehta_university_bkn: Ph.D., Master's Degree, NET/SLET/SET (As per post)

content_sections.heading: BKNMU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BKNMU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BKNMU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BKNMU Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor: Ph.D. with 10 years teaching/research experience, 10 publications, research score 120 as per UGC Regulations 2018. Associate Professor: Ph.D. with Master's 55%, 8 years experience, 7 publications, research score 75 as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor: Master's 55% with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018.

rows.event: Date of Commencement of Online Application
Last date of receipt of hardcopy of online application

content_sections.heading: BKNMU Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on Academic/Research Score Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BKNMU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.bknmu.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BKNMU Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for BKNMU Teaching Positions is 08 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by BKNMU?
faq.answer: Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University has announced a total of 5 vacancies for Teaching Positions in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Professor position, candidates must possess a Master's degree with at least 55% marks and qualify in NET/SLET/SET or hold a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the BKNMU Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST candidates is 750. For General/OBC and PwBD candidates, there is no application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Professor post is in the pay scale of 144200-218200 (Level-14) as per the UGC Regulations.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BKNMU Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic and research scores, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for BKNMU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the BKNMU website or through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University?
faq.answer: The official website of Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University is www.bknmu.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. Does BKNMU offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed here and should be confirmed by referring to the official notification.
